tools.name: msf_search
tools.description: Search for Metasploit modules by keyword (e.g., 'jboss', 'smb', 'CVE-2017-0144'). Always search first to find the exact module path.

tools.name: msf_run
tools.description: Execute a Metasploit module. Input format for 'args' MUST be: '<module_path>; set RHOSTS <target>; run'. Example: 'auxiliary/scanner/http/jboss_vulnscan; set RHOSTS 10.10.10.5; run'
